lead: Recent developments in education technology reveal significant concerns regarding data privacy in school apps, alongside opportunities for students to access affordable technology.

stories.title: Analysis of 200 education dept-endorsed school apps finds most are selling BS when it comes to the privacy of children’s data
stories.summary: A recent analysis of 200 school apps endorsed by education departments has uncovered alarming practices regarding children's data privacy. Many of these apps were found to be exploiting user data while failing to uphold their privacy promises. This raises serious concerns about the safety and security of children's information in educational technology.

stories.title: How to qualify for Apple's education discount - and get a $499 MacBook Neo for school
stories.summary: Apple is offering significant discounts on its new MacBook Neo for students and educators, making it an attractive option for those in the education sector. For just $499, eligible individuals can purchase this budget-friendly laptop, which is ideal for school use. This initiative aims to support students and educators in accessing necessary technology at a lower cost.
